message:
fix: render AgentSelector dropdown via portal to escape overflow-hidden ancestors (#3783) (#3785)

The agent dropdown in the AI Missions sidebar was not visible when clicked
because the sidebar and its toolbar containers use overflow-hidden, which
clips the absolutely-positioned dropdown panel. This renders the dropdown
using createPortal to document.body with fixed positioning computed from
the button's bounding rect, allowing it to appear above all containers.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
